name: v1.0.0 — ClawShell 2.0 DEEP Initial Release
body:
## ClawShell 2.0 — DEEP v1.0.0

**一云多端分布式神经架构** | One Cloud Multi-Edge Distributed Neural Architecture

### Architecture

Octopus-inspired: 1 Cortex (Cloud Brain) + N Ganglions (Edge Brains)

- **Cortex**: Architecture planning, deep thinking, insight analysis, review & summary, result broadcasting, terminal management. Consensus knowledge deployed to Alibaba Cloud ECS/OSS + GitHub + MemOS Cloud.
- **Ganglion**: Installed on endpoints, auto-adapts to 8 OpenClaw-like architectures, self-discovers plugins/tools. Runs independently when offline.

### Core Principles

- **Cybernetics**: PID feedback control loop, dynamic strategy switching
- **Heterogeneous Equivalence**: 8 OpenClaw variant adapters, unified EventBus protocol
- **Non-invasive**: Bridge script injection, never modifies target core code
- **Low Coupling**: EventBus pub/sub + standardized Pydantic Schema
- **High Robustness**: 3-layer repair (self-healing -> auto-repair -> manual)
- **High Collaboration**: Ecological niche matching (capability 40% + load 30% + trust 30%)
- **Portability**: pip install -e ., cross-platform
- **Idempotency**: Repeated install/register has no side effects
- **Edge-Cloud Version Decoupling**: Independent config, independent evolution

### Modules (28 Source Files, 2,238 LOC)

**shared** — types (17 enums), models (20+ Pydantic v2), config (YAML+ENV)
**neural_bus** — EventBus (priority heap + wildcard + JSONL), MessageCodec + MessageFactory, WebSocket transport
**cortex** — CortexCore + PID control loop + StrategySwitcher (5 strategies), InsightEngine, TerminalManager (niche matching), BroadcastEngine, Alibaba OSS/MemOS/GitHub adapters
**ganglion** — PerceptionEngine (4D + 8 architecture detection), AdaptationEngine (3-layer repair), PluginManager (5 builtin), 8 OpenClaw variant adapters
**storage** — KnowledgeStore (JSON + LRU) + MemoryStore (decay + importance ranking)

### Test Results

```
38/38 tests passed in 15.02s
```

### Quick Start

```bash
python scripts/install.py
clawshell init --mode ganglion
clawshell init --mode cortex
clawshell cortex --host 0.0.0.0 --port 9000
clawshell ganglion --cortex-host server-ip --cortex-port 9000
```

### Build Stats

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Source files | 28 |
| Lines of code | 2,238 |
| Enumerations | 17 |
| Pydantic models | 20+ |
| Strategy states | 5 |
| OpenClaw variants | 8 |
| Builtin plugins | 5 |
| Test functions | 38 |
| Repair layers | 3 |
| Perception dimensions | 6 |

---

*ClawShell 2.0 — Cybernetics-driven self-evolving exoskeleton*
